hero.title: Korean Developers and Designers in Vancouver
hero.subtitle: KDD is a community for Korean IT professionals in Vancouver to share knowledge and grow together.
hero.at_a_glance_subtitle: KDD (Korean Developers & Designers) is the largest Korean IT community in Western Canada, founded in 2017. We are a platform where various IT professionals, including developers, designers, planners, and students, gather to share knowledge and experience, collaborate, and grow together.

hero.title: Studies
hero.subtitle:
KDD studies go beyond simple learning.
It's a process of growing together by sharing experiences and concerns.

From official KDD studies to member-proposed groups,
various forms of learning meetings are open.

sections.past_subtitle: Look back at previous KDD studies.

hero.title: About
hero.subtitle: KDD is a community for Korean IT professionals in Vancouver to share knowledge, discover new possibilities, and grow together.

story.title: Our Story
story.description:
KDD began in 2017 with a small wish from a developer working in Vancouver.

The starting point was the hope that there would be a place where Koreans from different fields could gather, talk together, and create synergy to pursue something.

After the first meeting, as the number of like-minded people gradually increased, KDD became a community where Korean IT professionals can freely connect and grow.

Today, KDD is developing into a platform that shares knowledge and experience through regular meetups, mentoring, and annual conferences, and supports continuous growth and professional networking of the Korean IT community.

values.title: Values
values.subtitle: Six hearts that KDD creates together

items.sharing_desc: Provides a place to share knowledge and experience to grow together.
items.growth_desc: Provides opportunities to develop expertise and expand networks.
items.connections_desc: Provides a community you can rely on and get help from anytime.
items.inspiration_desc: Leads creative change through new attempts and diverse stories.
items.collaboration_desc: Creates greater possibilities through cooperative projects and partnerships.
items.opportunity_desc: Provides a stepping stone for career and growth.
